title: Tragacantha oligantha
taxonomy: Tragacantha oligantha is classified as a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae and is a part of the tribe Astragalus. This plant is also known as a member of the genus Astragalus, but some classifications group it under the genus Tragacantha. Tragacantha oligantha is a specific species within the Astragalus genus. The classification of Tragacantha oligantha is subject to revision as new research emerges.

intro: Tragacantha oligantha, also known as Oliganthes, is a type of spiny shrub or perennial plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, contributing to its potential in treating various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Tragacantha oligantha include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
